cards.title: Breathing Exercise
cards.description: Breathe deep. Go beyond your limits. Charge every cell in your body and take back control of your mind.

cards.title: Cold Plunge
cards.description: Face the cold. Feel it. Own it. This is where comfort ends and true strength begins.

cards.title: Cold Shower
cards.description: Turn it cold and don’t hesitate. Train your mind to stay calm, focused, and powerful in the face of stress.

cards.title: Push up
cards.description: Use your breath. Tap into raw power. Go deeper, push harder, and discover strength you didn’t know you had.

cards.title: Plank
cards.description: Hold strong. Stay steady. Embrace the burn and build unshakable focus, power, and control from within.
